auth_note: All endpoints (except /auth/login) require JWT Bearer token. Login each user to get a token before running tests. RBAC hierarchy: VIEWER < STAFF < MANAGER < ADMIN < SUPER_ADMIN.

uuid_rules.note: Zod schema uses z.uuid() which requires valid UUID v4 format. Non-v4 UUIDs like 00000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000999 will fail Zod validation (400) before reaching the service layer.

setup_dependencies: MinIO running on localhost:9000 with bucket 'nexa-attachments'
Seeded users: admin (SUPER_ADMIN), manager (MANAGER), staff (STAFF), viewer (VIEWER)
Seeded PaymentTerms and VatCode entities for polymorphic entity references
Environment variables: S3_ENDPOINT, S3_REGION, S3_ACCESS_KEY_ID, S3_SECRET_ACCESS_KEY, S3_BUCKET_NAME, S3_FORCE_PATH_STYLE
entity_registry_note: Valid entity types: Customer, CustomerInvoice, SalesOrder, PurchaseOrder, SupplierBill, Employee, JournalEntry, InventoryItem, GoodsReceiptNote, SupplierPayment, CustomerPayment, CreditNote, Dispatch, Department, VatCode, PaymentTerms. Only entities with existing Prisma models work — others return ENTITY_TYPE_NOT_AVAILABLE (400). PaymentTerms and VatCode have seeded data; Department has no rows yet.

endpoints.description: Confirm upload completion — verifies S3 object exists, creates Attachment DB record (STAFF+)

test_cases.name: Confirm upload - happy path (presign then confirm end-to-end)
test_cases.note: This test requires first calling presign to get a storageKey, uploading a file to S3 via the presigned URL, then confirming. The storageKey from the presign response must be used here.

db_verification.query: SELECT id, entity_type, entity_id, file_name, mime_type, uploaded_by FROM attachments WHERE storage_key = '{{STORAGE_KEY_FROM_PRESIGN}}'
db_verification.expected: Row exists with entityType='PaymentTerms', entityId='56d0c4e7-026b-4655-ab50-ea2a859c1a76', fileName='invoice-scan.pdf', mimeType='application/pdf'

test_cases.name: Confirm upload - storageKey doesn't match tenant prefix
Confirm upload - S3 object not found (not yet uploaded)
test_cases.note: Use a storageKey with correct prefix but where no file was uploaded

test_cases.name: Confirm upload - blocked MIME type re-validation
Confirm upload - invalid entity type
Confirm upload - missing storageKey field
Confirm upload - VIEWER denied (requires STAFF+)
